Ocoee restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Ocoee restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 14 Ocoee restaurants we grade, 10 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Ocoee restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Ocoee?

We currently publish 14 graded restaurants in Ocoee, with an average diner rating of 4.1 stars; 10 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
